default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Smith.ai and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO optimization, and upcoming tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [4 new blog posts ready for publication after minor adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Tabled discussion on integrations page updates; focus remains on blog content](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [Exploring backlink building opportunities with high DA (40+) domains](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [New blog post topics added to "Empty" category for future development](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)
  - [Streamlining blog image creation process with templates and stock photos](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)

## Topics

### Blog Post Review and Publication

  - [4 new blog posts drafted and reviewed](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Minor issues:](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
      - [Date format appearing oddly in preview (likely resolves on live site)](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
      - [Image resolution needs improvement for one post](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
      - [Comma formatting issue in hover text (web dev to be consulted)](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [Action items:](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
      - [Open external links in new tabs](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
      - [Add keywords and article links to metadata](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
      - [Elvis to make final revisions and publish](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)

### SEO Optimization for Integration Pages

  - [Elvis proposed expanding content on integration pages (e.g., Google Voice, 3Cx, Simple Practice)](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [Aim: Improve click-through rates by targeting specific keywords](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [Maddy suggested tabling this idea for now, focusing on blog content instead](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)

### Backlink Building Strategy

  - [Discussed two approaches:](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
    1.  Email outreach to add Smith.ai to existing articles
    2.  Guest posting on high-authority domains
  - [GrowthX has internal backlink exchange system and external resources](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
  - [Target: Domains with DA 40+](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Example: Rosie.com's recent success in getting listed in AI tool roundups](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### Content Planning and Scheduling

  - [Elvis added new topic ideas to "Empty" category in content management system](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [Maddy to review and move \~20 topics to "Ready to Start" when time allows](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [Scheduling note: Maddy unavailable for meetings in 1st and 3rd weeks of April](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)

### Blog Image Creation Process

  - [Current process is time-consuming, impacting content volume](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Solution: Create \~20 stock photos and 4 templates for mix-and-match variety](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)
  - [New brand-aligned templates being developed for various post types (e.g., app reviews)](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [Confirmed necessity of two images per post: main (no text overlay) and social (with title)](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)

### Content Strategy Alignment

  - [Elvis to send Maddy two relevant articles for review:](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)
    1.  How to grow a plumbing business
    2.  How to create a sales funnel
  - [Goal: Ensure tone and approach align with target ICP (Ideal Customer Profile)](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Elvis to finalize and publish 4 new blog posts, sharing links with Maddy for final review](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [Maddy to review new blog topic ideas in "Empty" category](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [Elvis to connect with Jimmy regarding backlink building opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=861.0)
  - [Maddy to provide additional guidelines for Smith.ai's Webflow setup](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [Elvis to send Maddy two articles for content strategy alignment review](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
  - [Continue using current image creation process while awaiting new templates](https://fathom.video/share/UGEoKJCH1vx61t5cXezSKzckKbg7ctnW?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)

action_items.description: Fix grainy image issue in blog post, ensure high-res
Set external links to open in new tabs for all blog posts
Fill in keywords section for each blog post
Contact Jimmy re: link building opps, focus on 40+ DA domains
Add 20+ blog topics to "Empty" section in content pipeline
Review all blog post images for line/quality issues, fix as needed
Publish prepared blog posts, send links to Maddy for final review
Final review of published blog posts Elvis sends
Send Maddy articles on plumbing biz growth + sales funnel for tone review
